product_overview: Backend REST API for a second‑hand marketplace providing user authentication, product catalog and moderation, cart and checkout flows, seller onboarding, and real‑time chat + AI-assisted search. Built with Express, MongoDB, Redis, and Socket.IO to support authenticated workflows and admin operations.
core_goals: Provide secure JWT-based authentication and account management (register, login, refresh, profile update).
Expose a searchable, pageable product catalog with seller-managed listings and admin moderation.
Support buyer cart and order lifecycle including checkout, order confirmation, admin order views and payout triggers.
Enable seller onboarding with review/approval workflows and admin management.
Offer real-time chat and AI-assisted product search features for improved discovery and buyer/seller communication.
Ensure clear error handling for business rules, authorization, and validation; surface operational issues (e.g., known chat startup bug) for rapid remediation.

features.name: Authentication and Account Management API
features.description: Allows users to register, log in, refresh tokens, and update their account profile using JWT authentication.
user_flows: POST /eco-market/auth/register with valid email and password -> Receive 200 Account with verification state
POST /eco-market/auth/register with already-registered email -> Receive 400 Validation or business error
POST /eco-market/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 Access and refresh tokens
POST /eco-market/auth/login with invalid credentials -> Receive 401 Invalid credentials
POST /eco-market/auth/refresh with valid refresh token -> Receive 200 New access token
POST /eco-market/auth/refresh with invalid or expired refresh token -> Receive 401 Invalid refresh token
PUT /eco-market/auth/update with valid access token and profile body -> Receive 200 Updated account profile
PUT /eco-market/auth/update without access token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Product Catalog and Listing API
features.description: Publicly browse featured products and search; sellers can create listings and admins can moderate product status.
user_flows: GET /eco-market/products/featured without token -> Receive 200 Product[]
GET /eco-market/products/search?q=term without token -> Receive 200 Product[]
POST /eco-market/products with valid seller token and body {name, price, categoryId} -> Receive 200 Created product
POST /eco-market/products without token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized
POST /eco-market/products with invalid body (missing price) -> Receive 400 Validation error
PATCH /eco-market/products/:productId/status with valid admin token and moderation payload -> Receive 200 Updated product moderation status
PATCH /eco-market/products/:productId/status with non-admin token -> Receive 403 Forbidden

features.name: Order and Checkout API
features.description: Create orders during checkout, list buyer orders, confirm receipt, and provide admin order views for management and payouts.
user_flows: POST /eco-market/orders with valid buyer token and checkout payload -> Receive 200 Created order
POST /eco-market/orders with valid token but violating business rule (e.g., insufficient inventory) -> Receive 400 Business rule error
GET /eco-market/orders/my-orders with valid buyer token -> Receive 200 Order[]
PATCH /eco-market/orders/:id/confirm-received with valid buyer token -> Receive 200 Updated order
PATCH /eco-market/orders/:id/confirm-received without token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized
GET /eco-market/orders/admin/all with valid admin token -> Receive 200 Paginated order list
GET /eco-market/orders/admin/all with non-admin token -> Receive 403 Forbidden

features.name: Cart API
features.description: Manage a user's shopping cart: view cart, add items, and update item quantities.
user_flows: GET /eco-market/cart with valid user token -> Receive 200 Cart object
POST /eco-market/cart with valid user token and body {productId, quantity} -> Receive 200 Updated cart
POST /eco-market/cart with invalid productId -> Receive 400 Validation error
PUT /eco-market/cart/:id with valid user token and new quantity -> Receive 200 Updated cart item
GET /eco-market/cart without token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Chat and AI-Assisted Search API
features.description: Provide real-time conversations and AI-assisted product search and optimized chat messages for users (requires Socket.IO + AI services).
user_flows: GET /eco-market/chat/conversations with valid user token -> Receive 200 Conversation[]
GET /eco-market/chat/conversations without token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized
POST /eco-market/chat/ai/search-products with valid user token and query -> Receive 200 AI-ranked products
POST /eco-market/chat/ai/search-products with valid token but AI service error -> Receive 500 Server Error
POST /eco-market/chat/optimized/send with valid user token and message payload -> Receive 200 Sent message payload
POST /eco-market/chat/optimized/send while server has chat route startup issue -> Receive 500 Server Error (known limitation: undefined route callback in chat routes can prevent server boot)

features.name: Seller Onboarding and Administration API
features.description: Enable users to apply to be sellers, check request status, and allow admins to view and manage seller requests.
user_flows: POST /eco-market/sellers/register with valid user token and seller application body -> Receive 200 Submitted seller request
POST /eco-market/sellers/register without token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized
GET /eco-market/sellers/request-status with valid user token -> Receive 200 Seller status payload
GET /eco-market/sellers/admin/all with valid admin token -> Receive 200 Seller[]
GET /eco-market/sellers/admin/all with non-admin token -> Receive 403 Forbidden

known_limitations.issue: Backend startup fails due undefined route callback in chat routes
known_limitations.impact: API server cannot boot, blocking end-to-end execution tests
